reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A good college with helpful faculty and a nice campus environment.

review_content.Placements: The college has a dedicated placement cell that invites reputed companies. Many students get placed with good packages and training sessions are provided as well. They conduct training sessions like resume building, group discussions and interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course is well-equipped with modern classrooms, projectors, and labs. The hostels are clean and provide all basic facilities. The hostels are clean, secure, and comfortable offering basic amenities like Wi-Fi, mess facilities, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025

review_content.Placements: Internship season (summer as we call it) is good and saw many companies (Deloitte, Deutsche Bank, etc. ). Fighting to grab the zero-day spot to grab the best minds. The stipend offered range from Rs. 5,000-80,000 per month. High-profile companies like Morgan, Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, HUL, Nestled, Deutsche Bank, American Express, etc., visited the campus. IT companies are the maximum in terms of numbers as well as recruitment. Even the banker's bank, RBI visited and created a huge competition among candidates. The average salary package is 11. 8 LPA and the maximum domestic package is 32 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: Internship season (summer as we call it) is good and saw many companies (Deloitte, Deutsche Bank, etc. ). Fighting to grab the zero-day spot to grab the best minds. The stipend offered range from Rs. 5,000-80,000 per month. High-profile companies like Morgan, Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, HUL, Nestled, Deutsche Bank, American Express, etc., visited the campus. IT companies are the maximum in terms of numbers as well as recruitment. Even the banker's bank, RBI visited and created a huge competition among candidates. The average salary package is 11. 8 LPA and the maximum domestic package is 32 LPA.
